analysis.summary: First Lady Melania Trump made a rare public statement on Thursday, April 9, 2026, denying any relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, stating she was not his victim and that Epstein did not introduce her to President Donald Trump. She also called for Congress to hold an open hearing for Epstein survivors. The statement prompted bipartisan calls for congressional hearings and drew commentary from political figures including Rep. Thomas Massie and Alex Jones.
